resources.string: No plan for this month yet
Reminders & backup status will appear here.
%1$d days since the last backup. Your data isn\'t protected if you lose the phone.
You haven\'t backed up yet. Tap to save an encrypted backup file.
Set the income target for this period
Add 23 standard categories to this plan
Carry over recurring items (monthly/quarterly/yearly) to the next period
Delete ALL categories & items — start over
Override Needs / Wants / Invest percentages for this plan only
These percentages only apply to this plan period. The default in Settings stays the same.
Total %1$d%% — should be 100. Percentages will be auto-normalized in calculations.
This plan has no allocations yet (Needs/Wants/Investment).
No plan for this month yet
Build a new one — set up categories & items as you go. Or use the starter template if you\'d like a head start.
%1$d active accounts · %2$s in accounts · details in Assets tab
%1$d active accounts · details in Assets tab
No transactions yet. Tap the + button to log your first expense.
Protect your money data — back up now.
The active period is set automatically from Period Start Day in Settings. Old plans are read-only.
Delete the \"%1$s\" category and all plan items inside it. This action can\'t be undone.
Total income you expect for this period. Used as the baseline for the plan progress bar.
All categories and plan items in this period will be deleted.\n\nLogged transactions are kept but lose their link to the old plan items.
Photograph a receipt to auto-fill an expense
Tap Continue to open the expense form. Detected fields are pre-filled. The receipt photo is auto-attached (~200 KB compressed).
Use biometrics to unlock the app.
Biometrics not supported in this context.
No open debts yet. Add one via Assets → Debts.
No local backup files yet. Create one with the Backup Now button first.
No data to back up yet. Add an account or transaction first.
Generate a compact report to share or archive
Import transactions from a CSV file
Generate a PDF report summarizing your net worth, accounts, transactions, and top expenses. The file is stored temporarily on this device — you decide whether to share or archive it.
PDF generated. Open to preview or share it with another app.
The PDF lives in the app cache and may be cleared by the system at any time. If you need to keep it, use Share to save it to Files / Drive.
Choose light or dark mode, or follow the device setting.
Show the intro tour & reset initial preferences
Enter your PIN or use biometric to unlock.
Track outgoing money — must be tied to a plan item
Move money between your own accounts
Snap a receipt → auto-fills an expense draft
Mark this expense as a debt repayment.
Mark if this income is monthly (e.g. salary). Shown as a reminder in the next period.
Default percentages for Needs / Wants / Investment. Total must be 100%. Applies to future plans.
Your data stays safe & encrypted on this phone. Open the app again anytime.
No plan items yet. Create some in the Plan tab.
Sakuwise was built on one principle: your financial data is yours alone. The app never sends anything to our servers or any third party — we don\'t even run servers.

All your data — accounts, transactions, plans, assets, debts, notes, reminders — is stored only on this phone, inside a SQLCipher database encrypted with AES-256 using a key protected by the Android Keystore (hardware-backed on devices that support it).

Sakuwise does not declare INTERNET permission. No analytics, telemetry, crash reporting, A/B testing, or ads. No PII (full name, email, national ID, phone number) is asked for or stored. Only a short nickname for greetings, and that stays local.

You decide when, where, and how to back up. The .sakuwise file is re-encrypted with the backup PIN you set (Argon2id KDF + AES-256-GCM). Sakuwise never stores that backup PIN — if you lose it, we cannot recover the file.
Open Me → Reset App → type the confirmation phrase to permanently wipe every byte of app data. Once erased, no one can recover it unless you hold a valid backup file.

The Scan Receipt (OCR) feature asks for camera permission only when you use it. The image is processed 100%% on-device via ML Kit — nothing leaves your phone, and nothing is retained once extraction finishes.
See the Contact Developer page under About Sakuwise.
Sakuwise stands on the shoulders of giants. Key libraries:
Full license text for each library is available in its upstream repository. Sakuwise itself is not yet open source in V1 — we\'ll release it in steps as the project matures.
Sakuwise is built by a small team in Indonesia. We read every piece of feedback that comes in.
Include reproduction steps, screenshots, and the app version (see About). Please don\'t send raw backup files — we don\'t need them and you don\'t want them circulating.
Have an idea for the V2 roadmap? Drop us an email or open an issue on GitHub.
Sakuwise is a local-first budgeting app — all your data lives on your phone, no cloud, no tracking.
Just for greetings and security. Nothing goes to a server — it all stays on your phone.
Used for the greeting on Home.
Used if biometric fails. Can be changed anytime in Settings.
Fingerprint / face — faster than typing the PIN.
No Sakuwise servers. No telemetry. Internet is only used if you opt in to Google Drive backup — even then the file is encrypted on-device before upload.
The database & receipt photos are all encrypted with AES-256.
No login. Sakuwise doesn\'t know who you are.
Backup files are encrypted — you keep the file, you keep the PIN.
We\'ll set up a Cash account first. Rename it, change the balance, or continue as-is.
0 is fine — you can update later.
No accounts yet. Tap + to add your first one.
No snapshots yet. Tap Reconcile to log the real balance and align it with the app balance.
No transactions in this account yet.
Open your bank / e-wallet app, check the real balance, type it here — Sakuwise will log the difference as an adjustment transaction.
E.g. Forgot to log a snack
Review the difference below. An automatic transaction will be recorded.
Will be added as an adjustment income.
Will be recorded as an adjustment expense.
Your Sakuwise balance now matches your bank/e-wallet.
Delete this reconciliation snapshot? Any linked adjustment transactions remain — only this balance record will be removed.
Use a long passphrase (≥8 chars) instead of a 6-digit PIN. After enabling, set it via the button below.
Notification permission denied — reminder can\'t appear
Pick when you want to be reminded each month. Recurs every 30 days at the same time.
Tap an account to view detail, snapshot history, and reconciliation.
Scan income txns tagged [BERULANG] and write this month\'s
No recurring incomes needed to be added.
0 is fine — you can update later.
Changing the starting balance shifts every balance calculation for this account.
Archived accounts hide from pickers but transaction history stays visible.
No property yet. Tap + to add your first asset.
Will be recorded as an expense in %1$s.
Leave empty for documentation only (no balance impact).
Update manually based on market estimate
No gold batches yet. Tap + to add your first purchase.
Update manually based on today\'s gold sell price (Antam, Pegadaian, etc.). Auto-fetch is coming in V2.
Tip: Monthly updates are enough. Gold prices don\'t fluctuate wildly day-to-day, and Sakuwise stores this as a snapshot — recallable anytime.
Record the final sale price. If you pick an account, the proceeds will be logged as automatic income.
Will be added as income to %1$s.
Will not be recorded as income.
No deposits/pension yet. Tap + to add.
No debts recorded yet. Tap + to add.
Will be recorded as an expense in %1$s.
Will be recorded as income in %1$s.
Leave empty for note only (no balance impact).
Fingerprint / face. Available if your device supports it.
No PIN yet — set one so the app stays secure without biometric.
The device PIN unlocks the app day-to-day. The separate backup PIN is only used when exporting a backup file — set lazily the first time you tap Backup.
PIN doesn\'t match the previous step.
How long before the app locks itself. Reopen with PIN or biometric.
Lock as soon as the app moves to background
Good if you switch context often
Which day of the month a monthly plan starts. Default is the 1st (calendar month). Set to 25 if payday is the 25th.
Note: For February (28/29 days), start days greater than the last day of the month fall on the last day of that month.
App interface language. Takes effect on the next screen you open.
Total must equal 100% before you can save.
This nickname is only for the greeting on Home. Sakuwise doesn\'t store an email or any other identifier.
Privacy: Sakuwise doesn\'t store full name, email, national ID, or any other identity — just a nickname for greetings.
Sakuwise is a local-first, encrypted budgeting app with Indonesian context. Your data never leaves this phone.
Update manually based on today\'s gold sell price (Antam, Pegadaian, etc.). Auto-fetch is coming in V2.
Monthly updates are enough. Gold prices don\'t fluctuate wildly day-to-day, and Sakuwise stores this as a snapshot — recallable anytime.
Wipe all data and start over
All accounts, transactions, plans, assets, debts, and reminders will be permanently deleted. Your last .sakuwise backup is NOT removed from storage.
Type "%1$s" to enable the reset button.
All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. Accounts, transactions, plans, and assets will all be gone. This action cannot be undone.
Delete all transaction history without removing Plans, accounts, or asset data. Useful for re-importing from scratch.
All transactions will be permanently deleted. Plans, accounts, and asset data are not affected.
Sakuwise is free for everyone. If it helps you, buy us a coffee to say thanks.
Sakuwise doesn\'t process payments inside the app. All donations flow through external platforms.
Regular backups protect your data if your phone goes missing. After 60 days a blocking modal appears on app launch.
6 digits, separate from the device PIN. Used to encrypt the backup file.
All data → an AES-256-GCM encrypted .sakuwise file. Your PIN is the key.
You pick where to store it
Local storage, USB, or manually upload to Google Drive / iCloud. Sakuwise never auto-uploads.
Pick the file → enter the backup PIN → everything comes back.
A 6-digit PIN to encrypt the backup file. Write it down somewhere safe — Sakuwise does not store this PIN.
Enter the PIN once more to confirm.
⚠ Important: If you lose this PIN, the backup file cannot be restored. Sakuwise is zero-knowledge — there is no backdoor.
AES-256-GCM. Argon2id KDF. No data leaves this phone.
Pick the .sakuwise file you saved earlier, then enter the backup PIN. Restore will REPLACE all data in this app.
Tap \'Change\' to pick a different file
⚠ Restore will REPLACE all current app data with the backup file\'s data. Make sure that\'s what you want.
Data from the backup file has been written into this install. Re-launch the app so every screen refreshes with the new data.
Note: Your app PIN & nickname are NOT restored — those live only in this install. Financial data (accounts, plans, transactions, assets) is back.
Backups go to a private app-data folder — they don\'t show up in regular Drive.
Automatically uploads backup file to Drive daily
Never auto-backed up — enable toggle and create a manual backup first
Enter your backup PIN to encrypt your data before uploading to Google Drive.
No backup files in this Drive yet.
Enter the backup PIN you used when creating this file. The current data WILL be replaced.
Optional. Saved on device, never uploaded.
Take a photo with the camera
Pick a photo from the gallery
It\'s been %1$s days since your last backup. Back up now to protect your data.
An allocation crossed 100%. Tap to see details.
%d rows don\'t match a Plan item
Transactions are still imported but not linked to the budget. Make sure the Category and Item names match exactly.
No accounts yet. Create an account first.
Please wait, don\'t close this screen.
Trend chart appears after 2 months of use
No PIN yet — Tap to set
⚠️ Keep this PIN somewhere safe. Without it you cannot restore your data from backup.
Enter a new auto-backup PIN (6 digits).
Create a 6-digit PIN to encrypt your daily auto-backup.\nKeep this PIN — you\'ll need it to restore.
